name: Terrapin 3 Acquisition Corporation
description: Terrapin 3 Acquisition Corporation was a blank check company, also known as a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was incorporated in Delaware and focused on identifying and acquiring a target business to take public. In 2016, Terrapin 3 Acquisition Corporation completed a business combination with Yatra Online, Inc., a leading online travel agency in India, subsequently transitioning its operations and focus.
